label: Gene category
description: Defines a category used to group genes in the gene editor UI.

displayPriorityInXenotype.label: Display priority in xenotype
displayPriorityInXenotype.description: Sort order for this category in the xenotype gene editor. Higher values appear later.

displayPriorityInGenepack.label: Display priority in genepack
displayPriorityInGenepack.description: Sort order for this category in the genepack gene editor. Higher values appear later.
